subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that, through His infinite divine bounties, thou hast attained unto that which is the cause of exaltation, loftiness and salvation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از عنایات نامتناهیه الهیه فائز شدی بانچه که سبب علو و سمو و نجاتست
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
